claim: Israeli missile strike on Evin Prison
title: Evin Prison Fire Falsely Attributed to Missile Strike
original_context: A fire broke out at Evin Prison in Tehran, Iran, following clashes among inmates.

timeline.event: Original photograph published by Reuters showing fire at Evin Prison, Tehran.
Image reused in viral social media posts with altered context, claiming it shows an Israeli missile strike.
Fact-checkers debunked the reused claim, identifying the original 2022 context.

claim: Protestors breaking into government building in Paris
title: Old Protest Footage from 2018 Yellow Vests Misrepresented as 2024
original_context: Yellow Vests protesters clashing with police in Paris in 2018.

timeline.event: Original video recorded during 'Gilets Jaunes' protests in Paris.
Footage recirculated claiming to show current farmers' protests.
